text:
EVANGELION: 3.333 Breakdown is a video included in the home video release of Evangelion: 3.333 You Can (Not) Redo. It was released on 25 August 2021. It is a making-of video that breaks down and reconstructs the filming and special effects work process in EVANGELION:3.333, which was included in the special features disc of the Blu-ray release. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/20210817-2/ The video was also published for free on the AMUSEMENT CREATIVE」公式チャンネル YouTube channel on August 17, 2021.
